title: question relating to MP Eva series in EoE
display_title: question relating to MP Eva series in EoE
wikitext:
[]: question relating to MP Eva series in EoE             Quote Post by duexmachina » Thu Feb 07, 2013 3:03 am so it;s been a while since i have actually seen the film completely. But even when i was on tip top shape with my eva knowledge, i never understood why it was that the eva series stabbed themselves with the replica lances? " i dont think they directly did anything for the 3rd impact..[(maybe besides the kabbalah (sp?)]

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Thu Feb 07, 2013 3:11 am It was Anno's will.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Feb 07, 2013 3:17 am A prevailing theory at one point in time was to release the souls in their cores so they could partake in instrumentality.

[]: Re: question relating to MP Eva series in EoE             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Feb 07, 2013 3:59 am duexmachina wrote: i never understood why it was that the eva series stabbed themselves with the replica lances?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Thu Feb 07, 2013 5:11 am ^ Pretty much. The whole exercise is a near unfathomable FAR ritual. Nothing is stated specifically why. I do recall though that the MPEs generate the Anti-AT Field with the resonance between their S² engines, but that happens before they start impaling themselves. In my mind it's just something to do with them "synchronising" with Unit-01 and/or Rei-Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Thu Feb 07, 2013 12:26 pm Because Instrumentality is suicide, they enact suicide.

[]:             Quote Post by pioneer » Fri Feb 08, 2013 1:19 am I didn't think Seele intended to have the MP evas stab themselves with the fake lances, I think it's something Rei/Lilith made them do after taking over 3I/starting Instrumentality. Did having Rei faces at the time mean that they were under control of Rei/Lilith? How do the MP evas turning into Rei fit in with seemingly every human seeing Rei before dying/becoming part of Instrumentality?

[]: Re: question relating to MP Eva series in EoE             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 08, 2013 5:32 am Lavinius wrote: Because Instrumentality is suicide, they enact suicide.

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Fri Feb 22, 2013 11:53 pm i see...

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Feb 23, 2013 1:47 am But wait, do the MP Series have souls in their cores?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Feb 23, 2013 2:01 am Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: But wait, do the MP Series have souls in their cores?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Feb 23, 2013 2:49 am Ornette wrote: A prevailing theory at one point in time was to release the souls in their cores so they could partake in instrumentality.
